{{еє≤жФѓ}} '''дЄЩжИМ'''пЉИгБ≤гБЃгБИгБДгБђгАБгБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБДгБђгАБгБЄгБДгБШгВЕгБ§пЉЙгБѓгАБ[[еє≤жФѓ]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ
еє≤жФѓгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ23зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дєЩйЕЙ]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[дЄБдЇ•]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[дЄЩ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[зБЂ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[жИМ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[еЬЯ]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄзФЯпЉИгБЭгБЖгБШгВЗгБЖпЉЙ|зЫЄзФЯ]]пЉИзБЂзФЯеЬЯпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩжИМгБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶26гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМдЄЩжИМгБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дЄЩжИМгБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[26еєі]] *[[86еєі]] *[[146еєі]] *[[206еєі]] *[[266еєі]] *[[326еєі]] *[[386еєі]] *[[446еєі]] *[[506еєі]] *[[566еєі]] *[[626еєі]] *[[686еєі]] *[[746еєі]] *[[806еєі]] *[[866еєі]] *[[926еєі]] *[[986еєі]] | *[[1046еєі]] *[[1106еєі]] *[[1166еєі]] *[[1226еєі]] *[[1286еєі]] *[[1346еєі]] *[[1406еєі]] *[[1466еєі]] *[[1526еєі]] *[[1586еєі]] *[[1646еєі]] *[[1706еєі]] *[[1766еєі]] *[[1826еєі]] *[[1886еєі]] *[[1946еєі]] | *[[2006еєі]] *[[2066еєі]] *[[2126еєі]] *[[2186еєі]] *[[2246еєі]] *[[2306еєі]] *[[2366еєі]] *[[2426еєі]] *[[2486еєі]] *[[2546еєі]] *[[2606еєі]] *[[2666еєі]] *[[2726еєі]] *[[2786еєі]] *[[2846еєі]] *[[2906еєі]] *[[2966еєі]] |}
==дЄЩжИМгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ0гГї5пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[еЇЪ]]гГї[[дєЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[9жЬИ]]гБМдЄЩжИМгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгАБгБУгБУгБІи®АгБЖжЬИгБѓ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[еѓТйЬ≤]]гБЛгВЙ[[зЂЛеЖђ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•== дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[еНБжЦєжЪЃ]]гБЃ3жЧ•зЫЃгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:дЄЩжИМ]]

==дЄЩжИМгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ0гГї5пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[еЇЪ]]гГї[[дєЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[9жЬИ]]гБМдЄЩжИМгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгАБгБУгБУгБІи®АгБЖжЬИгБѓ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[еѓТйЬ≤]]гБЛгВЙ[[зЂЛеЖђ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ23зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дєЩйЕЙ]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[дЄБдЇ•]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[дЄЩ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[зБЂ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[жИМ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[еЬЯ]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄзФЯпЉИгБЭгБЖгБШгВЗгБЖпЉЙ|зЫЄзФЯ]]пЉИзБЂзФЯеЬЯпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩжИМгБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶26гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМдЄЩжИМгБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дЄЩжИМгБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[26еєі]] *[[86еєі]] *[[146еєі]] *[[206еєі]] *[[266еєі]] *[[326еєі]] *[[386еєі]] *[[446еєі]] *[[506еєі]] *[[566еєі]] *[[626еєі]] *[[686еєі]] *[[746еєі]] *[[806еєі]] *[[866еєі]] *[[926еєі]] *[[986еєі]] | *[[1046еєі]] *[[1106еєі]] *[[1166еєі]] *[[1226еєі]] *[[1286еєі]] *[[1346еєі]] *[[1406еєі]] *[[1466еєі]] *[[1526еєі]] *[[1586еєі]] *[[1646еєі]] *[[1706еєі]] *[[1766еєі]] *[[1826еєі]] *[[1886еєі]] *[[1946еєі]] | *[[2006еєі]] *[[2066еєі]] *[[2126еєі]] *[[2186еєі]] *[[2246еєі]] *[[2306еєі]] *[[2366еєі]] *[[2426еєі]] *[[2486еєі]] *[[2546еєі]] *[[2606еєі]] *[[2666еєі]] *[[2726еєі]] *[[2786еєі]] *[[2846еєі]] *[[2906еєі]] *[[2966еєі]] |}
==дЄЩжИМгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ0гГї5пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[еЇЪ]]гГї[[дєЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[9жЬИ]]гБМдЄЩжИМгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгАБгБУгБУгБІи®АгБЖжЬИгБѓ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[еѓТйЬ≤]]гБЛгВЙ[[зЂЛеЖђ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•== дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄЩжИМгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[еНБжЦєжЪЃ]]гБЃ3жЧ•зЫЃгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:дЄЩжИМ]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:дЄЩжИМ]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:дЄЩжИМ]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Dog}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:дЄЩжИМ]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Fire Dog]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yang Fire Dog]]

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Dog (дЄЩжИМ) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngx≈Ђ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-inu ***Onyomi 1: heiju ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsul (л≥СмИ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh TuбЇ•t

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. '''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dog== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dog|kanji=дЄЩжИМ|romaji=hinoe inu|onyomi=heijutsu|p=b«Рx≈Ђ|w=ping-hs√Љ|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є …Хy|y=bing2 seot1|j=bing2 seot1|ci=p…™≈Л s≈УtћЪ|mc=p√¶≈Л syt|oc-bs=pra≈Л ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dog|kanji=дЄЩжИМ|romaji=hinoe inu|onyomi=heijutsu|p=b«Рx≈Ђ|w=ping-hs√Љ|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є …Хy|y=bing2 seot1|j=bing2 seot1|ci=p…™≈Л s≈УtћЪ|mc=p√¶≈Л syt|oc-bs=pra≈Л ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ ==Years of Yang Fire Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 26 when divided by 60 is a year of Bingu.

==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dog|kanji=дЄЩжИМ|romaji=hinoe inu|onyomi=heijutsu|p=b«Рx≈Ђ|w=ping-hs√Љ|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є …Хy|y=bing2 seot1|j=bing2 seot1|ci=p…™≈Л s≈УtћЪ|mc=p√¶≈Л syt|oc-bs=pra≈Л ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ
