==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==

=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}вАЩ {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дЄЩжИМ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuy≈Н|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|дєЩйЕЙ|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuy≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly ==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
